What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can sho

author: RadicalSoda
text:
Gaslighting Youtubers with my ✨FNAF QUIZ✨
🐥PLUSH!🐥: https://youtooz.com/products/radicalsoda-plush-9-inch

It's a Five Nights at Freddys quiz like you've never seen with @Saltydkdan, @Dawko, and @AstralSpiff! I've concocted some truly terrible, twisted questions for them to "enjoy"! Please enjoy, and can we please get wet freddy into the actual games please

#--------------------------- Categories ------------------------------#
🩸Works of Art - I've drawn a FNAF Character within a strict time limit, who is it?
🏀Scrapped for Parts - Can you guess the Animatronic just by seeing it's eye? Or it's foot? Or it's butt?
🎁Markiplier - Hello everybody 
🎄Fakematronics - One of these animatronics isn't quite right...
💎Freddily Feud - I made a poll asking my audience questions to tally the most popular answers, which our contestants must guess!
🔮Are they even real? - Which FNAF characters actually exist?
